subcodes.first_line: Hearken thou unto My call from the precincts of My prison, that I may acquaint thee with what hath befallen My Beauty at the hands of the manifestations of My majesty, and that thou mayest know [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ندائی من شطر سجنی لیطلعک بما ورد علی جمالی من مظاهر جلالی و تعرف
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
